inputs.prompt: Topic: Why most people fail at learning a new language as adults. Format: YouTube long-form. Tone: direct, science-backed. Audience: 28-45, frustrated learners who have tried apps and courses.

Topic: How wastewater epidemiology is being used to track drug consumption patterns in cities by testing sewage samples. Format: YouTube long-form. Tone: serious journalism. Audience: public health professionals and policy wonks.

Topic: Why the Dutch housing crisis is worse than most Europeans realize, despite the Netherlands being one of the wealthiest countries in the EU. Format: Documentary opening. Tone: serious journalism. Audience: European viewers interested in housing policy.
Topic: Something about how technology is changing things. Format: Podcast. Audience: general.
